The '''Stomper Brigade''' was a brigade of [[YVH 5-S Bugcruncher|YVH 5-S]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. The droids were under the command of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], and were tasked to retake [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] during the [[Battle of Tenupe]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{1st}}
